what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that associates attachment att-549b307f with board item item-abb5f912 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
target uses a board:// URI: board://item-abb5f912
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
standouts: target is a board:// URI pointing to item-abb5f912
conventions: ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit UTC offset
board:// URI scheme for cross-system target references
concerns: File contains only metadata; the actual attachment payload is not present
No author, editor, or change-history fields
Meaning of 'board_items' and the referenced board item are not defined within the file
notes: A lightweight, timestamped metadata stub linking a channel attachment to a specific board item.
questions: What content or artifact does attachment att-549b307f actually represent?
What is the semantic meaning of board item item-abb5f912?
Is the attachment generated automatically or added manually?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose (as a channel attachment record) matches its content: it records an association to a board item.
apparent_themes: Cross-reference and traceability between channels and boards
intention_signals: The file appears intended to create a durable, queryable link between a channel attachment and a board item for integration or audit purposes.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI as the target of a channel attachment is a distinct linking convention.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a board item, enabling cross-system referencing without embedding payload data.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata file that links attachment att-549b307f in dragnet-development to board item item-abb5f912 via a board:// URI.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a channel attachment is associated with a specific board item at a known time.
